instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: volcanic eruption night.

Patch:
- remove sv_037-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_037-path-002.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#1a0e10"
- download-sv_037-circle-001.cx: 187.0 -> 120
- download-sv_037-path-009.stroke-width: 11.0 -> 6
- download-sv_037-ellipse-001.opacity: 0.38 -> 0.85
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">

    </linearGradient>

      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#2a1418" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#140a0e" />
    </linearGradient>

      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#5a1a1a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1a0a12" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="ash17" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="24" /></filter>
    <filter id="glow17" x="-60%" y="-60%" width="220%" height="220%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="10" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky17)" id="download-sv_037-rect-001" />
